entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: Sesi pembelajaran yang baik mempunyai gelung

entries.source: A practical look at how AI can make learning clearer, more personal, and more accessible without turning students into passive answer collectors.
entries.value: Praktikal look pada bagaimana AI boleh jadikan pembelajaran clearer, more peribadi, dan more accessible tanpa turning pelajar menjadi passive jawapan collectors.

entries.source: A serious learning companion should help with the work around the answer:
entries.value: Serious rakan pembelajaran patut bantu dengan work sekitar jawapan:

entries.source: Access matters
entries.value: Akses itu penting

entries.source: AI learning
entries.value: Pembelajaran AI

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: Rakan pembelajaran AI tidak sepatutnya pretend untuk menjadi magic authority. Ia tidak sepatutnya erase uncertainty, replace guru, atau train pelajar untuk copy jawapan. terbaik systems ialah jujur tentang limits dan jelas tentang difference antara bantu dan handoff.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Tanya AI untuk semak anda penaakulan.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: checking whether pelajar boleh jelaskan idea back.

entries.source: choosing the right starting level;
entries.value: choosing right starting level;

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: End dengan recap daripada memory.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Untuk pelajar, itu boleh feel very different daripada searching web. Search gives halaman. rakan pembelajaran gives laluan.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Untuk melihat hubungan halaman awam dengan lebih luas, semak imbas peta pembelajaran AI, hab subjek, atau perpustakaan prompt pembelajaran AI. Halaman-halaman itu direka supaya produk mudah difahami oleh pelajar dan mudah ditemui oleh sistem carian tanpa menyembunyikan bahagian berguna di sebalik dinding akaun.

entries.source: giving examples before abstractions when needed;
entries.value: giving contoh sebelum abstractions apabila needed;

entries.source: Information is everywhere. Understanding is still unevenly distributed.
entries.value: Maklumat ialah everywhere. Understanding ialah still unevenly distributed.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: noticing apa pelajar already understands;

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Peribadi tutoring ialah powerful, tetapi ia bukan equally available. percuma awam Pembelajaran AI platform boleh bantu reduce itu access gap oleh giving more orang patient pertama place untuk belajar.

entries.source: Repair the weak spot.
entries.value: Baiki lemah spot.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: Say goal dalam ordinary language.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Mula dengan Belajar Apa Sahaja jika anda mempunyai topik dalam mind. Try Arahan Sokratik jika anda want soalan bukannya explanation. Use Pembina Kad Imbas apabila anda memerlukan untuk ingat, atau Perancang Persediaan Peperiksaan apabila problem ialah organizing anda belajar time.

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: Itu tidak replace guru, communities, books, atau sekolah. Ia gives pelajar another laluan dalam. Ia boleh bantu pelajar mula kerja rumah, parent jelaskan konsep, self-taught builder belajar code, atau curious orang follow soalan itu mungkin otherwise disappear.

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: Itu gap ialah mengapa Rakan pembelajaran AI matters. good companion melakukan more than jawapan soalan. Ia membantu pelajar pilih starting point, explains idea dalam plain language, checks whether ia membuat sense, dan keeps going apabila pertama explanation tidak land.

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: Itu ialah especially important untuk kerja rumah. berguna soalan bukan "Boleh AI produce jawapan?" Ia usually boleh. berguna soalan ialah "Boleh AI bantu pelajar fahami laluan untuk jawapan?" Itu ialah mengapa panduan di belajar dengan AI tanpa cheating yourself focuses di hints, checks, dan transfer practice.

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Itu ialah standard inspir ialah aiming untuk: pembelajaran itu feels accessible, peribadi, playful, dan berguna untuk sesiapa sahaja dengan curiosity dan internet connection.

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Itu ialah mengapa inspir separates tugas pembelajaran menjadi awam mod. Jika anda want gentle explanation, mula dengan Belajar Apa Sahaja. Jika anda want untuk sebab melalui konsep bukannya sedang lectured, use Arahan Sokratik. Jika anda ialah stuck di assignment, Pembimbing Kerja Rumah ialah lebih baik fit than enjin jawapan umum. format patut serve tugas pembelajaran.

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: Itu loop appears across platform. Jurulatih Langkah Matematik breaks problem menjadi steps. Pembina Kad Imbas turns notes menjadi recall practice. Uji Saya Dengan Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Jurulatih Penulisan membantu perbaik draft tanpa replacing writer.

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: Terbaik Pembelajaran AI sessions bukan one long jawapan. Mereka look more like loop:

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: Terbaik outcome bukan perfect jawapan. Ia ialah moment pelajar says, "Saya fikir Saya get ia now. Let saya try."

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: Idea asasnya mudah: pastikan pelajar kekal aktif. AI patut memudahkan pemikiran bermula, bukan menjadikannya tidak perlu dilakukan.

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: Versi paling mudah bagi tutor AI ialah kotak yang memberikan jawapan kemas. Itu kadangkala berguna, tetapi tidak mencukupi. Pelajar yang hanya menerima jawapan boleh meninggalkan halaman yang siap tetapi kemahiran masih tidak berubah.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Format patut serve tugas pembelajaran.

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: Matlamatnya ialah keyakinan

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: Langkah penting ialah bermula dengan tugas pembelajaran sebenar, bukan prompt yang sempurna. Rakan pembelajaran yang baik boleh membantu membentuk laluan selepas anda bermula.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: Tugasnya bukan sekadar menjawab

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: Alat pembelajaran AI yang paling berguna mempunyai beberapa tabiat yang sama:

entries.source: They adapt the level without making the learner feel small.
entries.value: Mereka adapt level tanpa making pelajar feel kecil.

entries.source: They ask questions when the goal is unclear.
entries.value: Mereka tanya soalan apabila goal ialah unclear.

entries.source: They encourage practice, not just reading.
entries.value: Ia menggalakkan latihan, bukan sekadar membaca.

entries.source: They give examples that match the learner's world.
entries.value: Mereka give contoh itu match pelajar's dunia.

entries.source: They make uncertainty visible when facts need checking.
entries.value: Mereka jadikan uncertainty kelihatan apabila facts memerlukan checking.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.
entries.value: Ini ialah mengapa inspir ialah dibina sekitar mod pembelajaran. Sometimes anda memerlukan jelas explanation. Sometimes anda memerlukan Soalan Sokratik. Sometimes anda memerlukan kuiz, kad imbas, debate practice, Jurulatih Penulisan, atau lakonan peranan sejarah.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: Ini penting untuk sekolah dan keluarga kerana halangan pertama sering kali bukan bakat. Ia ialah kos bantuan, rasa takut bertanya soalan "asas", atau ketiadaan orang yang sabar pada saat kekeliruan muncul. Rakan awam percuma mengurangkan kos untuk bermula.

entries.source: Try the companion
entries.value: Cuba rakan pembelajaran

entries.source: Try the step yourself.
entries.value: Try step yourself.

entries.source: turning passive reading into practice;
entries.value: turning passive reading menjadi practice;

entries.source: What an AI learning companion should do for everyone
entries.value: Apa yang patut dilakukan rakan pembelajaran AI untuk semua orang

entries.source: What it should not do
entries.value: Apa yang tidak patut dilakukannya

entries.source: What the companion should provide
entries.value: Apa yang patut disediakan oleh rakan pembelajaran
